properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 138/21
 THE NORWEGIAN AIRFORCE WILL CONDUCT AIRDROP OF CALIBRATION SPHERES
 IN THE PERIOD 02-03 NOV 2021 BETWEEN 0900 TO 1500 UTC.VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE 
 FOLLOWING DANGER AREAS WITH A RADIUS OF 4NM FROM THE POSITIONS:

 POSITION 1
 70-42.10N 31-21.03E
 POSITION 2
 71-01.08N 31-34.01E
